name: Improper Resource Locking
description: The product does not lock or does not correctly lock a resource when it must have exclusive access, allowing concurrent actors to modify the resource during critical operations and causing data corruption, instability, or crashes.
detection_pattern: STORAGE or TRANSFORM node performing read-modify-write or multi-step operations on a shared resource without a CONTROL node enforcing a lock or mutex, allowing concurrent access from multiple INGRESS or STRUCTURAL paths
